meta.title: Nawaporn Saengthong — UX Designer & Content Strategist

hero.tagline: Multi-disciplinary designer who believes words are a core part of great design — blending UX research, visual design, and storytelling into one craft.
hero.sub: นวพร แสงทอง — Bangkok, Thailand 🇹🇭

about.p1: Hi, I'm Nawaporn — a multi-disciplinary creative based in Bangkok with over 7 years in digital marketing and a growing passion for UX design.
about.p2: My journey started as a graphic design intern, evolved into content marketing and SEO strategy, and recently expanded into UX/UI design and UX writing through the Google UX Design Certificate. Not a pivot — a natural merging of skills, because great user experience requires both clear design and clear language.
about.p3: I believe words are a big part of design and marketing. Whether it's a push notification, a wireframe, an article, or a social post — every word shapes how people experience your product.

bullets: Write push notifications for the one31 app — TV programs, PR campaigns, and new articles
Produce 40+ articles/month: press releases, entertainment news, corporate news
Achieved 1.1M Facebook reach across Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube Community
Research topics and apply SEO best practices to improve article performance and engagement
Write monthly reports analyzing performance via Google Analytics and Facebook Creator Studio
Collaborate with software development and mar-com teams on content quality
Created engaging copy, image, and video content for social media platforms
Wrote a wide variety of articles for the company website
Participated in strategic planning for brand social media presence
Wrote monthly reports on social media and website performance
Designed creative concepts for social media and website campaigns
Collaborated with Senior Graphic Designers on marketing materials

skills.title: What I do.
skills.sub: A multi-disciplinary skillset spanning design, research, writing, and strategy.

items.title: UX / UI Design
items.desc: Empathy maps, personas, user journeys, wireframes, prototypes, mockups in Figma & Adobe XD. Accessibility-first at every stage.

items.title: UX Research
items.desc: User interviews, usability studies, competitive audits, Crazy Eights, and How Might We sessions — evidence-based design.

items.title: UX Writing & Copy
items.desc: Clear, purposeful microcopy — push notifications, error messages, onboarding flows, CTAs, and in-product language.

items.title: SEO & Content Strategy
items.desc: Keyword research, on-page SEO, editorial planning, and performance reporting via Google Analytics.

items.title: Social Media Content
items.desc: Multi-platform strategy across Facebook, Twitter, YouTube — trending content, community management, and reach optimization.

items.title: Video & Graphic Design
items.desc: Adobe Premiere Pro video editing. Campaign and social media visuals with Photoshop and Illustrator.

work.title: Selected work.
work.sub: A mix of UX research, product design, content strategy, and creative work.

projects.title: HearAround App — Case Study
projects.desc: End-to-end UX research and design for an audio-based app. User interviews, empathy maps, wireframes, and usability testing.

projects.title: MealFlix — Web & App Design
projects.desc: Responsive web and mobile design for a food/streaming platform. Visual hierarchy, typography, and mobile-first layouts.

projects.title: UX Writing Practice
projects.desc: UX writing samples — error messages, onboarding copy, tooltips, empty states, and push notifications.

projects.title: Online Article Portfolio
projects.desc: SEO-optimized articles across entertainment, lifestyle, and corporate news. Published on one31.net.

projects.title: Social Media Content
projects.desc: Multi-platform strategy across Facebook, Twitter and YouTube — trend-led posts with 1.1M+ reach.

projects.title: Push Notification Copy
projects.desc: High-converting push notification copy for the one31 app — crafted to drive opens for TV programs and campaigns.

projects.title: Graphic Design Portfolio
projects.desc: Social media graphics, campaign artwork, and brand content using Photoshop and Illustrator.

projects.title: Website Content Management
projects.desc: End-to-end WordPress content management — publishing, scheduling, and cross-team quality control.

contact.sub: I'm open to UX design roles, content strategy positions, and creative collaborations. Based in Bangkok — available for remote and on-site opportunities.
